notesDescription: Key points to remember for each theme to help you prepare for the civic exam.
infoIntro: Starting from January 1, 2026, the civic exam will be required for people applying for a pluriannual residence permit (CSP) or a resident card (CR).
infoMarianneContent: The law of January 26, 2024 to control immigration, improve integration has strengthened the requirements for French mastery and republican integration of first-time foreign arrivals wishing to stay permanently in France. This law provides for the creation of a civic exam that aims to verify the candidate's knowledge of the principles and values of the Republic, the organization of the Republic, and the functioning of French society.

aboutIntro: CiviquePrep is your comprehensive preparation tool for the French civic exam required for residence permit (CSP) and resident card (CR) applications.
aboutTrainingDesc: Practice with real exam questions. Filter by theme, search specific topics, and learn at your own pace.
aboutExamDesc: Take timed practice exams in different difficulty levels to simulate the real test conditions.
aboutSmartDesc: Our spaced repetition system prioritizes questions you struggle with for more efficient learning.
aboutProgressDesc: Track your performance with detailed statistics and identify areas that need more attention.
aboutBookmarksDesc: Save difficult questions to review later. Create your personalized study list.
aboutStreaksDesc: Stay motivated with daily practice streaks and earn achievements for your progress.
aboutHelpDesc: We provide all the tools you need to pass your civic exam: practice questions, mock exams, progress tracking, and personalized recommendations.
aboutContactDesc: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you!
flashcardDesc: Quick memorization mode with flip cards
noFlashcardBookmarks: No flashcard bookmarks yet. Bookmark cards during flashcard sessions to review them here.
infoFaqDocTitle: What documents do I need to bring?
infoFaqDocContent: You must bring a valid identity document (passport or residence permit).
infoFaqCostTitle: How much does the exam cost?
infoFaqCostContent: The fee for the civic exam is set by each organization. Please visit the website of your chosen organization to find the exact price.
infoFaqResultTitle: When will I receive the results?
infoFaqResultContent: Results are usually communicated within a few business days. They are sent by email and available on your candidate portal.
infoFaqValidityTitle: How long is the certificate valid?
infoFaqValidityContent: The civic exam certificate is valid indefinitely once obtained.
infoFaqRetakeTitle: Can I retake the exam if I fail?
infoFaqRetakeContent: Yes, you can retake the exam as many times as needed. There is no limit on the number of attempts.
